talents.description_raw: After switching Weapons, your Secondary Weapon does 20% more Damage. The Effect lasts until reloading or switching back to your Primary Weapon.

talents.description: Reviving a Squad Member restores them to full Health
talents.description_raw: Reviving a Squad Member restores them to full Health

talents.description: When Iron Halo expends all its energy, 1 Armour Segment is restored for all Squad Members
talents.description_raw: When Iron Halo expends all its energy, 1 Armour Segment is restored for all Squad Members

talents.description: Iron Halo loses energy 20% more slowly
talents.description_raw: Iron Halo loses energy 20% more slowly

talents.description: When Iron Halo expends all of its energy, enemies in a 10 -metre radius take significant Damage that scales with difficulty
talents.description_raw: When Iron Halo expends all of its energy, enemies in a 10-metre radius take significant Damage that scales with difficulty

talents.description: When Iron Halo is active, all Squad Members within 20 metres regenerate Ability Charge 50% faster
talents.description_raw: When Iron Halo is active, all Squad Members within 20 metres regenerate Ability Charge 50% faster

talents.description: After using Equipment, your Ranged Damage increases by 15% for 10 seconds
talents.description_raw: After using Equipment, your Ranged Damage increases by 15% for 10 seconds

talents.description: Damage from Charged Melee Attacks increases by 20%
talents.description_raw: Damage from Charged Melee Attacks increases by 20%

talents.description: Damage from Equipment increases by 35%
talents.description_raw: Damage from Equipment increases by 35%

talents.description: All Squad Members within 15 metres of an active Tarantula Sentry Gun take 25% less Damage and deal 15% more Damage
talents.description_raw: All Squad Members within 15 metres of an active Tarantula Sentry Gun take 25% less Damage and deal 15% more Damage

talents.description: Enemies hit by the Servo-Gun take 15% more Damage for 10 seconds
talents.description_raw: Enemies hit by the Servo-Gun take 15% more Damage for 10 seconds

talents.description: Servo-Gun recharges 15% faster
talents.description_raw: Servo-Gun recharges 15% faster

talents.description: After using the Servo-Gun, Melee Damage increases by 35% for 10 seconds
talents.description_raw: After using the Servo-Gun, Melee Damage increases by 35% for 10 seconds

talents.description: Killing or incapacitating Majoris -level or higher enemies with the Servo- Gun regenerates its Ability Charge by 100% . Cooldown is 90 seconds.
talents.description_raw: Killing or incapacitating Majoris-level or higher enemies with the Servo- Gun regenerates its Ability Charge by 100%. Cooldown is 90 seconds.

talents.description: The Servo-Gun now locks on to a single target and fires powerful precision shots
talents.description_raw: The Servo-Gun now locks on to a single target and fires powerful precision shots

talents.description: Enemies damaged by Equipment take 25% more Damage for 10 seconds
talents.description_raw: Enemies damaged by Equipment take 25% more Damage for 10 seconds

talents.description: After a Finisher, your Melee Weapon deals 20% more Damage for 15 seconds
talents.description_raw: After a Finisher, your Melee Weapon deals 20% more Damage for 15 seconds

talents.description: All Squad Members fully regenerate their Armour and gain 1 additional Armour Segment when using Medicae Stimms
talents.description_raw: All Squad Members fully regenerate their Armour and gain 1 additional Armour Segment when using Medicae Stimms

talents.description: While the Servo-Gun is active, you do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back

talents.description: Tarantula Sentry Gun Damage increases by 30% and Ammo increases by 50%
talents.description_raw: Tarantula Sentry Gun Damage increases by 30% and Ammo increases by 50%

talents.description: Killing enemies with the Servo-Gun restores 1 Armor Segment. Cooldown is 30 seconds.
talents.description_raw: Killing enemies with the Servo-Gun restores 1 Armor Segment. Cooldown is 30 seconds.

talents.description: The Servo-Gun marks a zone and automatically attacks enemies that enter it, using 50% less energy per shot

talents.description: The Servo-Gun now guards a targeted area and fires exploding Plasma projectiles at enemies that enter it

talents.description: Ranged Damage at ranges greater than 20 metres increases by 25%

talents.description_raw: All Squad Members gain 1 additional Equipment (except Melta Bomb)

talents.description_raw: Servo-Gun recharge rate increases by 15% when you are near a Tarantula Sentry Gun
